channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Guideline-based lymph node sampling not linked to higher postoperative complications in lung cancer
item.description: Lymph node sampling using the 3+1 rule did not increase complications after lung cancer surgery, according to the study.

item.title: New data supports medication switch in select MS patients
item.description: Switching to a less immunosuppressive therapy may be advisable for MS patients with high infection rates or adverse events on anti-CD20 treatment.

item.title: Augmented reality system could simplify medical ultrasound interpretation
item.description: A new augmented reality tool helps technicians convert 2D ultrasound images into 3D representations, making interpretation easier.

item.title: Scotland approves bispecific antibody for refractory myeloma
item.description: The SMC has accepted talquetamab for relapsed and refractory multiple myeloma, offering a new treatment option for eligible patients in Scotland.
